title: SimpleMultiplayerPing
description: Client-side Minecraft ping mod for multiplayer servers like Hypixel. Mark locations and communicate with teammates using quick pings and a ping wheel. No server installation required.
body: # Simple Multiplayer Ping **Simple Multiplayer Ping** is a **client-side ping mod for Minecraft multiplayer** that allows players to **mark locations in the world and communicate with teammates in games like Bedwars or Skywars using visual pings**. The system works similar to the **ping mechanics in games like Valorant, Apex Legends, or Fortnite**, allowing players to quickly highlight important locations without voice chat. Because the mod is **client-side only**, it works on **any multiplayer server**, including minigame servers like **Hypixel**, without requiring installation on the server. --- ![White Diamond Ping](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23bd0609169e2decd44f36cd9f47d52fc7bf47e3_0.webp) --- # Minecraft Ping System The mod adds a **fast and intuitive ping system** that allows players to highlight locations directly in the world. Players can: **Click the mouse wheel** to place a quick ping **Hold the mouse wheel** to open the **Ping Wheel** with more options This allows teams to communicate instantly during gameplay. ### Ping Wheel Example ![Shows the ping wheel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9248a15bac5489c9ee6af20aaa75588fe6756cb7_0.webp) --- # Ping Types The mod currently includes three ping types: **Normal Ping** — mark an important location **Warning Ping** — alert teammates about danger **Move Ping** — suggest where teammates should go These pings help players coordinate during: Bedwars PvP fights Survival multiplayer Exploration Team events --- # Works on Multiplayer Servers Unlike many Minecraft mods, **Simple Multiplayer Ping does not require a server mod**. This means it works on: Public multiplayer servers Minigame servers Private SMP servers Vanilla servers Examples: Hypixel Bedwars servers Small friend servers The mod only needs to be installed **on the client**. --- # Party System To share pings with other players, the mod uses a **simple party system**. Players can: Create a party Share the party code with friends Instantly see each other's pings For quick multiplayer sessions there is a **default party**: **Party Code: `1`** This allows players on small servers to start using the mod immediately. --- # Customization The ping system is fully customizable. Players can change: Ping color Ping size Ping duration Ping distance Ping sound Option to **show or hide the player name below the ping** Option to **display other players’ pings in different colors** ### Settings Menu ![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0e7943657e9171633f060cc160cd1eddd39c4a6_0.webp) --- # Map Integration Pings also integrate with popular Minecraft map mods. They appear on: **Xaero’s Minimap** **Xaero’s World Map** Players can also **middle-click a location on the world map** to place a ping directly at that position. --- # Example Pings ![Ping Lila](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8fbb58eda90ff000e4111fe4ba18616292e91fe_0.webp) --- # Relay Server To synchronize pings between players, the mod uses a lightweight **relay server**. You can either: Self-host the relay server Or use the **free hosted relay server** --- # Download & Source Code The mod and relay server are **open source**. GitHub repository: https://github.com/Miggo65/Minecraft_simpleMultiplayerPing --- # Development The mod is currently **under active development**. Occasionally the hosted relay server may be offline briefly during maintenance. If you want to help improve the project: Open an **issue on GitHub** Join the **GitHub Discussions** Please make sure you are using the **latest version** before reporting bugs. --- # FAQ **Does this ping mod work on Hypixel?** Yes. The mod is client-side only and does not require server installation. **Is there a Minecraft mod with a ping system like Valorant?** Yes. Simple Multiplayer Ping adds a Valorant-style ping system to Minecraft multiplayer. **Can I ping locations for teammates in Minecraft?** Yes. You can place pings directly in the world using the mouse wheel.
